name: Remix: Remix: Generated
description:
You are fixing and polishing an existing SaaS admin dashboard "LeadOS".

⚠️ STRICT RULES:

* DO NOT redesign layout or change fonts
* KEEP UI consistent
* ONLY fix bugs, improve UX, and make everything functional
* This is NOT a design task — this is a PRODUCT COMPLETION task

---

## 1. 📐 FEEDBACK PAGE ALIGNMENT (CRITICAL FIX)

Current issue:

* Table is misaligned
* Horizontal scrollbar looks broken
* Content overflow is ugly

Fix:

* Wrap table with: `overflow-x-auto`
* Use `table-fixed w-full`
* Add `truncate` for long comments
* Proper padding for each column (px-4 py-2)
* Align columns vertically center

Also ADD:

* "Add Feedback" button (top right)
* Modal:

  * select lead
  * RM
  * classification change
  * score change
  * comment
* On submit → update table via state (TanStack mutation)

---

## 2. 🌗 FIX DARK MODE (VERY IMPORTANT)

Current dark mode is BAD → fix properly

Do:

* Use Tailwind `dark:` classes everywhere
* Proper color tokens:

Light:

* bg-white
* text-gray-900

Dark:

* bg-[#0B0F14]
* card: bg-[#111827]
* border: border-gray-700
* text: text-gray-200

Fix:

* tables contrast
* chart visibility (labels + axes visible)
* remove faded greys
* ensure readability

Dark mode must feel like:
👉 Notion / Linear / Stripe level clean

---

## 3. 📚 KNOWLEDGE BASE (MAKE BUTTONS WORK)

Fix:

### Add Document Button:

* Open modal:

  * title
  * type (FAQ / Script / Guide)
  * content
* Save → update list

### Edit Action:

* Open same modal pre-filled
* Save updates

### Delete Action:

* Confirm modal → remove item

All actions must update state instantly

---

## 4. 👥 USERS PAGE (FIX ACTIONS)

Fix:

* Edit button → modal (name, role, status)
* Delete button → confirmation → remove user

Also add:

* Toggle Active/Inactive switch
* Live update in table

---

## 5. 📢 CAMPAIGNS PAGE (FULLY FUNCTIONAL)

Fix:

### Create Campaign:

* Modal:

  * name
  * source
  * budget (optional)
* Save → add to table

### View Campaign:

* Click row → open detail page

Campaign Detail Page:

* stats (total, hot, warm, cold)
* conversion %
* leads list
* performance chart

---

## 6. 👤 PROFILE ICON (FIX UX)

Current issue:

* Clicking profile logs out directly ❌

Fix:

* Clicking profile opens dropdown:

  * View Profile
  * Settings
  * Logout

* Logout should be separate action only

---

## 7. 💬 CONVERSATIONS (CRITICAL FIX)

Issues:

* not enough chats
* cannot scroll
* unclear UI

Fix:

Layout:

* Left → conversation list (scrollable)
* Right → chat window (scrollable)

Add:

* 10–15 mock conversations
* realistic chat messages

Fix scroll:

* use `overflow-y-auto`
* set fixed height (`h-[calc(100vh-...)]`)

Each chat must show:

* messages (AI + Lead)
* timestamps
* clear bubble design

---

## 8. 🔔 NOTIFICATION BUTTON (MAKE IT WORK)

Click bell icon → open dropdown:

Show:

* new lead assigned
* follow-up reminder
* conversation alert

Each item clickable → navigates to page

---

## 9. ⚙️ GLOBAL BUG FIXES

Fix everywhere:

* Buttons must trigger actions
* No dead clicks
* No static behavior

Use:

* TanStack Query mutations
* refetch after actions

---

## 10. ✨ FINAL UX POLISH

Add:

* loading skeletons
* success/error toasts
* hover states
* disabled states during loading

---

## FINAL GOAL

This should feel like:

👉 Fully working SaaS product
👉 Every click does something
👉 No broken UI
👉 No fake behavior

NOT a prototype.
NOT a demo.
A REAL working system.

---

DO NOT:

* change layout
* change fonts
* add weird design elements

ONLY:

* fix
* improve
* complete

Make it production-ready.
